tasks.label: cmake:build:analytics-worker
tasks.detail: -j1: the static OpenVINO link is very memory-heavy (~3.5GB binary); parallel jobs risk an OOM-truncated (silently empty) output on memory-constrained machines.

tasks.label: kill stale: analytics-worker (F5)
tasks.detail: Frees the gRPC port from a previous debug session that wasn't stopped cleanly.

tasks.label: dapr:analytics-worker:start
tasks.detail: Plain gRPC service invocation sidecar — no components (no pub/sub, no state store), no placement (not an actor). Lets vms_rec's VmsAnalytics (DAPR_ANALYTICS_WORKER_APP_ID=analytics-worker) discover this over local mDNS, same as vms_rec's own local dapr sidecars discover each other.
args: pid_dir=/tmp/video_a-dapr; name=analytics-worker; pid_file="$pid_dir/$name.pid"; log_file="$pid_dir/$name.log"; daprd_bin="$(command -v daprd || true)"; if [ -z "$daprd_bin" ] && [ -x "$HOME/.dapr/bin/daprd" ]; then daprd_bin="$HOME/.dapr/bin/daprd"; fi; mkdir -p "$pid_dir"; if [ -f "$pid_file" ] && kill -0 "$(cat "$pid_file")" 2>/dev/null; then exit 0; fi; rm -f "$pid_file"; if [ -z "$daprd_bin" ]; then echo "daprd not found in PATH or \$HOME/.dapr/bin" > "$log_file"; exit 1; fi; nohup "$daprd_bin" -app-id analytics-worker -app-port 50060 -app-protocol grpc -dapr-http-port 3611 -dapr-grpc-port 51012 -metrics-port 9201 -components-path ${workspaceFolder}/init_files/dapr_components -dapr-internal-grpc-port 49022 > "$log_file" 2>&1 & echo $! > "$pid_file"; sleep 2; if ! kill -0 "$(cat "$pid_file")" 2>/dev/null; then echo "daprd for $name failed to stay running. Log:"; sed -n '1,120p' "$log_file"; exit 1; fi

tasks.label: dapr:analytics-worker:stop
args: if [ -f /tmp/video_a-dapr/analytics-worker.pid ]; then kill "$(cat /tmp/video_a-dapr/analytics-worker.pid)" 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /tmp/video_a-dapr/analytics-worker.pid; fi
